data.title: Freddie Mac reports 30-year fixed-rate mortgage averages 6.26% marking a decrease.
data.description: Freddie Mac, headquartered in McLean, Virginia, published the findings of its Primary Mortgage Market Survey ® (PMMS ® ) on September 18, 2025. According to the report, the average interest rate for a 30-year fixed-rate mortgage (FRM) stood at 6.26%.

data.title: Akamai CEO Dr. Tom Leighton wins Technology & Engineering Emmy Lifetime Achievement Award. CB: $AKAM.
data.description: Dr. Tom Leighton, co-founder and CEO of Akamai, has been awarded a prestigious Technology & Engineering Emmy® Lifetime Achievement Award by the National Academy of Television Arts & Sciences. The recognition was announced on September 18, 2025, in CAMBRIDGE, Mass. Akamai Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: AKAM), a leading cybersecurity company, celebrated Dr. Leighton's visionary contributions to the field.

data.title: Inventor creates PETGO kiosk for self-service dog wash/grooming. Convenient solution for pet owners.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on September 18, 2025, an inventor from Nashville, Tennessee, introduced the PETGO kiosk designed to offer self-service dog washing and grooming for pet owners. The inventor aimed to provide a convenient solution and mentioned that the design is simple and user-friendly. This innovation is intended to cater to pet owners' needs and aims to provide them with everything required for the care of their pets.

data.title: Toku and Kota integrate to enhance benefit access in stablecoin platform.
data.description: Toku and Kota have recently announced a strategic integration to enhance benefit access within their stablecoin compensation platform. This collaboration aims to streamline the process and make it easier for users to access benefits. The platform has been experiencing rapid growth, with an increasing number of users joining. This integration will provide a more efficient and user-friendly experience for the platform's users.

data.title: NVIDIA introduces Blackwell, an advanced architecture revolutionizing AI factories, boosting AI inference at scale.
data.description: NVIDIA has introduced Blackwell, a revolutionary architecture tailored for fueling AI factories. This new design aims to improve AI inference capabilities on a massive scale, offering unparalleled efficiency. The unveiling of Blackwell marks a significant advancement in the AI industry, promising enhanced performance and scalability for AI-driven processes.

data.title: LayerZero's ZRO price jumps by 7.43% to $2.04, showing positive momentum with MACD and RSI indicators.
data.description: The price of ZRO has surged to $2.04, showing significant gains over the past 24 hours even as concerns mount over an upcoming token unlock. An analysis of the technical indicators indicates a bullish trend, with a MACD crossover and the RSI hovering in the neutral zone. Investors are closely monitoring the situation as the price continues to rise amidst these uncertainties.

data.title: VinFast introduces the VF 9 EV, catering to big families with its three-row option, ample space, and long range in the Canadian market short on choices.
data.description: In Markham, Ontario, families in Canada are increasingly seeking electric vehicles that can meet their needs, from hockey bags to long commutes, leading to a demand for options with both space and range. The VF 9 emerges as a standout choice with three rows, addressing the limited selection in the market. In scenarios like a September night in Burlington, Ontario, where a parent loads a hockey bag into the back of a three-row electric SUV, the VF 9 offers ample space and a comfortable cabin cooled to 22 degrees. This highlights the appeal of the VF 9 for Canadian families.

data.title: BTC has a 70% chance of reaching new highs in 2 weeks, with $114,000 liquidity. Which way will it go first?
data.description: According to an analyst, Bitcoin (BTC) has a 70% probability of reaching new record highs within the next fortnight, while emerging data suggests a rise in liquidity around the $114,000 mark. The question remains: which milestone will BTC achieve first?

data.title: Velocity Flexible Workspace in Mount Kisco, NY chosen as “Best in Coworking & Shared Space” by Westchester Magazine. Prestigious award in 2025.
data.description: Velocity Flexible Workspace in Mount Kisco, New York, recently received the Best in Coworking & Shared Space award from Westchester Magazine’s Best of Business Awards 2025. Situated in Westchester County, this workspace provides a contemporary and professional setting for businesses with various office options and affordable pricing. Offering fully serviced amenities, Velocity Flexible Workspace aims to cater to entrepreneurs and hosts a modern environment conducive to productivity.

data.title: Mikart and Nano PharmaSolutions report positive interim data from NT-301 Phase 1 trial and increase NanoTransformer® manufacturing capacity.
data.description: Mikart, LLC, a prominent contract development and manufacturing organization (CDMO), and Nano PharmaSolutions, Inc. (NPS), a company specializing in nanodrug delivery in the pharmaceutical sector, shared encouraging news on September 18, 2025. They disclosed favorable safety and pharmacokinetics data from their recent collaboration. This announcement underscores the success of their partnership in advancing pharmaceutical technology.

data.title: KPMG ehf. confirms financial covenants for Kaldalón hf. bond issuances, reviews issuer's calculations and annual reports.
data.description: KPMG ehf. has been appointed as the confirmation agent for Kaldalón hf. to oversee the financial and special covenants related to the company’s general security arrangement concerning its bond issuances. As the confirmation agent, KPMG ehf. will be responsible for verifying the accuracy of the issuer's calculations in reports assessing the status of financial and special covenants in comparison to annual and interim financial statements. Additionally, KPMG ehf. will confirm compliance with any further pledging or debt incurred under the general security arrangement for Kaldalón hf. This role is crucial in ensuring transparency and adherence to financial agreements.
